title: 20 Pcs Cat Worm Teaser Refills, Interactive Cat Wand Toy, Assorted Teaser Refills with Bells, Kitten Wands Toy for Indoor Cats Training Exerciser
features: 【 20PCS CAT WORMS REFILLS 】 This package includes 20pcs colorful worm replacement refills, enough worm toys for your cats to play for a long time.

【 CAT INTERACTIVE TOY】 Various colorful toys will arouse its curiosity, bring out your cat's predatory instincts, and they will jump, pounce, kick and chase. They'll keep your cat energized, increase her exercise, keep her happy and healthy.
[ HIGH QUALITY AND SAFE ] Cat Worm teaser toys are made of safe, eco-friendly material, and these plush lures are soft and sturdy, they will not snap cat's nails.
[ IMPROVE RELATIONSHIP ] With these worms toy, you can interactive with your kittens, this activity builds trust and companionship between you and your cat. Bring you and your cat a happy time.
[ EASY TO USE ] EACh is equipped with a loop for replacement, easy to be attached to anywhere you want. Perfect for hang on the wand, chair, door handle and cat climbing frame.
description: Feature - Color: multiple colors - Material: plush - Size: 25cm Package Includes 20 x cat worm toy
